config_file_locations.windows_note: Cryptic Engine stores local preferences in gameprefs.pref, which is a flat text file. Each line starts with PrefEntry followed by the setting name and its value (space-separated).

keys.notes: Fullscreen (1) generally yields better performance and frame consistency on single-monitor setups. Set to 0 if the user prefers windowed or borderless configurations.
Useful for multi-monitor setups. Change this value if the game constantly launches on the incorrect monitor.

keys.effect: Horizontal resolution in pixels when running in fullscreen mode.
Vertical resolution in pixels when running in fullscreen mode.
Horizontal resolution in pixels when running in windowed mode.
Vertical resolution in pixels when running in windowed mode.
Target display refresh rate in Hz.
keys.notes: Should match the desktop monitor refresh rate. Misalignment can cause screen tearing or stuttering.

keys.effect: Graphics rendering API device type (e.g. Direct3D11).
keys.notes: Forcing Direct3D11 is standard for modern GPUs. Direct3D9 is a legacy option that may cause instability or launch issues on newer hardware.

keys.effect: Field of View (FOV) angle for the camera.
keys.notes: Adjusting the FOV can improve situational awareness and comfort. Higher values increase the rendering area but may lower FPS.

notes: Cryptic Engine preferences are stored in gameprefs.pref. The file can be manually edited using any standard text editor.
If the gameprefs.pref file becomes corrupted, deleting it will force the game launcher or client to regenerate a fresh, default copy upon launch.
